positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of cosmic flora and fauna. Imagine luminous bioluminescent flowers blooming from roots that trail into deep space nebula clouds. Include geometric mandalas formed by interwoven star clusters and stylized crystalline ferns. Use a vibrant, high-contrast engraving style combined with ethereal neon glow effects. Central composition, clean silhouettes, perfect symmetry, deep indigo, electric magenta, and glowing gold color palette. Vector art, suitable for apparel printing, hyperdetailed.
